reviews.review_text: I didn't stay there so cannot rate the rooms. Reception staff were friendly and helpful. Enough staff on duty. Park grounds exceptionally clean and well maintained.
Local Hotel we call Heaven. Has great food and cold beer. Right next to warilla Grove shopping centre.
I stayed 12 nights on power site with my caravan and what a great experience it was as fairly quiet and very clean amenities and super friendly staff in reception AAA +++ 😁
Now own a van down there.

‼️IGNORE THE OLDER BAD COMMENTS  HERE AS THE PARK IS UNDER NEW MANAGEMENT & THEY ARE FRIENDLY, EFFICIENT & HELPFUL‼️
My mother bought a two bedroom home in the Over 60s Seniors Area of the park over 14 years ago & she absolutely loves living there. It is a very quiet area with very very friendly people everywhere & of course there is a rental section of the park with caravans, cabins & sites for camping or your own caravan.
I live here in a 2 bedroom cottage with my daughter, who has a slight disability anotherson has come for a visit

Freezing cold in early August, so bring your beanie. A lovely park to kick-back and relax.
Definitely worth s stay.
